nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2014; const int b = 2036; const int c = 2058; const int d = 2080; const int e = 2102; const int f = 2124; const int g = 2146; const int h = 2168; const int i = 2189; const int j = 2211; const int k = 2233; const int l = 2255; const int m = 2277; const int n = 2299; const int o = 2321;
